title: PKGBadges / CobbleBadges
body:
![PKGBADGES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caf3cc8d41916b0c1e13bae3e94d952a2bb4e78d.webp)

A Mod That Helps You Obtain Pokemon Gym Badges Can Be More Fun When Set Up With Cobblemon
With This Mod You Can Reward Your Friends After Battles
All Badges from the Pokemon Series, from the Kanto to the Paldea Region, are available
Kanto, Johto, Hoenn, Sinnoh, Unova, Kalos, Alola, Galar and Paldea

[Join Discord](https://discord.com/invite/SYq48RNu3K)

[Our Mod on CurseForge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pkgbadges)

Mod More Updates Coming Soon
